work_unit: sunset:gitignore-gaps — add data/ directory to .gitignore exclusions
situation: scout-scan reported sunset-prediction dirty=1 from untracked data/ directory containing runtime SQLite database (sunset.db + WAL/SHM), screenshots/, and xhs-posts/. Existing gitignore had *.db patterns but data/ itself was not excluded, causing the entire directory to show as untracked.
action: Added `data/` pattern to .gitignore before the existing *.db patterns, with comment explaining it covers SQLite + screenshots + posts. Kept *.db/*.db-wal/*.db-shm patterns as root-level fallback. Committed via opt-worktree into existing opt-sunset-1782670344 worktree.
outcome_evidence: git check-ignore -v data/ matched .gitignore:8:data/; git status after commit showed only ?? data/ (main restored, fix in worktree pending merge)
next_suggestion: Check other projects for similar gitignore gaps or stale PROGRESS.md (moni-master 1.8 days stale). Also wechat-main gitignore fix already in opt-wechat-1782668384 needs merge.
